productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Myrics Mid Brown Shoe
description: Nailing the classic loafer design on the head, the Myrics from rockport is a fabulous slip-on leather shoe designed for the smart you. The horse bit vamp embellishment, stand-up seam and man-made sole with a stack heel - all add to its style element. But the cherry on the icing is the Kinetic Air Circulator footbed with perforations to offer the ultimate in breathability and cushioned comfort.Upper Full grain leather upper with a horse bit vamp embellishment on the tongue for style, comfort and breathability Loafer design for easy wearing and removal of the foot Stitched seams for abrasion resistance Wraparound overlay with an additional overlay at the back foot for absolute support and durability Midsole EVA midsole for durability and to conform to the shape of the foot Foam footbed with Kinetic Air Circulator technology in the heel and perforations in the forefoot for durable cushioning and dry comfort for all-day use Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Man-made sole made of PU for lightweight durability Textured forefoot and front heel, with horizontally grooved back heel for ample grip and traction on various surfaces Brand badge on midfoot for style Raised heel with a curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
